title: carpesium nepalense var. nilagiricum
intro: Carpesium nepalense var. nilagiricum, also known as Nilagiri wormwood, is a variety of the Himalayan wormwood plant, which belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Nilagiri wormwood include its ability to relieve fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, making it a useful remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, Nilagiri wormwood is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to treat various health conditions, including skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues.
